mapper.sql: CONVERT(INT, DC_ID) AS id, SLNO AS serial, CASE WHEN CMD_DESC LIKE 'JAVA:%' THEN SUBSTRING(CMD_DESC, 6, 255) ELSE CMD_DESC END AS name, CAST(DC_CMD AS NVARCHAR(MAX)) AS content, ISNULL(CASE WHEN ISNUMERIC(DC_RES) = 1 THEN CONVERT(INT, DC_RES) ELSE NULL END, 0) AS status, ISNULL(CONVERT(INT, IS_DEL_EXECUTED), 0) AS send_status, ISNULL(CONVERT(INT, REF_ID), 0) AS err_count, DC_EXECDATE AS run_time, DC_DATE AS gmt_crate, ISNULL(DC_cmd_date, DC_DATE) AS gmt_modified
mapper.select:
select
from DEVICECMD where DC_ID = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER} and CMD_DESC like 'JAVA:%'

select
from DEVICECMD where ISNULL(CASE WHEN ISNUMERIC(DC_RES) = 1 THEN CONVERT(INT, DC_RES) ELSE NULL END, 0) = 0 and ISNULL(CONVERT(INT, IS_DEL_EXECUTED), 0) = #{sendStatus} and SLNO = #{serial} and ISNULL(CONVERT(INT, REF_ID), 0) != 3 and CMD_DESC like 'JAVA:%' order by DC_ID
mapper.update: update DEVICECMD set DC_RES = CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), #{status}), IS_DEL_EXECUTED = CASE WHEN #{sendStatus} = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, DC_EXECDATE = #{runTime}, DC_RESDATE = GETDATE(), DC_cmd_date = GETDATE() where DC_ID = #{id} and CMD_DESC like 'JAVA:%'
mapper.insert: insert into DEVICECMD ( SLNO, DC_CMD, DC_DATE, DC_EXECDATE, DC_RES, DC_RESDATE, CMD_DESC, REF_ID, src_sno, DC_cmd_date, IS_DEL_EXECUTED ) values ( #{serial,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, ISNULL(#{gmtCrate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, GETDATE()), #{runTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), ISNULL(#{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, 0)), NULL, 'JAVA:' + ISNULL(#{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'command'), ISNULL(#{errCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, 0), NULL, ISNULL(#{gmtModified,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, GETDATE()), CASE WHEN ISNULL(#{sendStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, 0) = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END )

insert into DEVICECMD ( SLNO, DC_CMD, DC_DATE, DC_EXECDATE, DC_RES, DC_RESDATE, CMD_DESC, REF_ID, src_sno, DC_cmd_date, IS_DEL_EXECUTED ) values ( #{serial,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, ISNULL(#{gmtCrate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, GETDATE()), #{runTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), ISNULL(#{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, 0)), NULL, 'JAVA:' + ISNULL(#{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'command'), ISNULL(#{errCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, 0), NULL, ISNULL(#{gmtModified,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, GETDATE()), CASE WHEN ISNULL(#{sendStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, 0) = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END )
mapper.update:
update DEVICECMD
SLNO = #{serial,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CMD_DESC = 'JAVA:' + #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DC_CMD = #{content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
DC_RES = CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}),
IS_DEL_EXECUTED = CASE WHEN #{sendStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER} = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,
REF_ID = #{errCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
DC_EXECDATE = #{runTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
DC_DATE = #{gmtCrate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
DC_cmd_date = #{gmtModified,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where DC_ID = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER} and CMD_DESC like 'JAVA:%'

update DEVICECMD set SLNO = #{serial,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CMD_DESC = 'JAVA:' + ISNULL(#{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'command'), DC_CMD = #{content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, DC_RES = CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), ISNULL(#{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, 0)), IS_DEL_EXECUTED = CASE WHEN ISNULL(#{sendStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, 0) = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, REF_ID = ISNULL(#{errCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, 0), DC_EXECDATE = #{runTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, DC_DATE = ISNULL(#{gmtCrate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, GETDATE()), DC_cmd_date = ISNULL(#{gmtModified,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, GETDATE()) where DC_ID = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER} and CMD_DESC like 'JAVA:%'
